title: The next era of AI coding
summary: Michael Truell outlines the evolution of software engineering toward AI-driven development, citing data showing 30% of Cursor's pull requests are fully agent-developed and enterprise code generation jumped from 15% to 75% AI-generated in one year. He forecasts engineers will transition to managing autonomous agent teams rather than writing code manually.
